utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- property_coverage: Includes plan name, description (home/contents context implied; explicitly mentions equipment), and monthly_cost. Costs are present. Fully specified per format.
- travel_coverage: Includes plan name, description, and monthly_cost. Costs are present. Fully specified per format.
- additional_services: Includes service name, description, and monthly_cost. Costs are present. Fully specified per format.
- total_budget: Provides monthly_cost and annual_cost. Fully specified per format.
Therefore, all 5 required items are included and specified with costs.
